title: Pre-Cover Inspection — Roof Insulation Over TPO Membrane Substrate
timing: After substrate preparation and before polyiso insulation board installation
acceptance_criteria: Deck surface is clean, dry, and free of debris. All penetration curbs are installed and properly secured. Deck joints are sealed. No ponding water present. Moisture scan confirms substrate moisture content below 25% per ASTM D4263.
responsible_party: BECx commissioning agent and roofing manufacturer representative
notes: This inspection is a mandatory hold point. Insulation installation must not begin until this inspection passes and is documented with photographs and signed inspection report.
